2 ?0 + ?6 = ?06
3 ?1 + ?7 = ?17

2 ?06 0100001000 2
3 ?17 1011000011 5

Constant
2 C 2 1111111111 a mismatch
2 C 2n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
2 I 0 1100010010 4 mismatch
2 I 0n 0011101101 6 mismatch

Unary 6
2 I 6 1000011010 4 mismatch
2 I 6n 0111100101 6 mismatch

Binary 06
2 AND 06 1000010010 3 mismatch
2 AND 06n 0111101101 7 mismatch
2 OR 06 1100011010 5 mismatch
2 OR 06n 0011100101 5 mismatch
2 XOR 06 0100001000 2 match 1/2
3 XOR 17 1011000011 5 match 2/2
all match XOR 06 17
2 XOR 06n 1011110111 8 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 06 0100000000 1 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 06n 1011111111 9 mismatch
2 OR-NOT 06 1111110111 9 mismatch

7 I 5

Extending defaults
2 0100001000 2
3 1011000011 5
Starting at I 5 increasing
I 6 1000011010 partial 0011101101 6
I 7 1111100010 partial 1011011110 7
left 13
Starting at I 2 decreasing
I 1 0100100001 partial 0000011101 4
I 0 1100010010 partial 0111100101 6
right 10
Choosing left
2 I 6
3 I 7

Selected
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 XOR 06
3 XOR 17
4 I 2
5 I 3
6 I 4
7 I 5

Applying to 11100110
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 4 = 0
1 I 5 = 1
2 XOR 06 = XOR(I 0,I 6) = XOR(1,1) = 0
3 XOR 17 = XOR(I 1,I 7) = XOR(1,0) = 1
4 I 2 = 1
5 I 3 = 0
6 I 4 = 0
7 I 5 = 1

\boxed{01011001}
